business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors

coverages_discussed.notes: Commercial Property coverage under form CP 00 10 10 12
Business Income and Extra Expense Coverage Form CP 15 08 (10 12); covers actual loss of Business Income during period of restoration
Endorsement CP 04 09 (10 12); effective 03/15/2026; covers direct physical loss to Covered Property caused by Equipment Breakdown accident to mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment
Endorsement CP 99 30 (07 88); effective 03/15/2026; Coinsurance Additional Condition suspended for specified property during Declarations period

Endorsement CP 04 17 (10 12); effective 03/15/2026; covers direct physical loss caused by interruption of utility services including water supply, communication supply, and power supply; annotation 'Need docs' noted on page
Additional Coverage; pays 25% of direct physical loss amount plus deductible; additional $25,000 available if that amount is inadequate
Additional Coverage; covers direct physical loss during move or temporary storage up to 30 days
Additional Coverage; $10,000 per described premises per 12-month period
Additional Coverage; $10,000 or actual loss amount, whichever is less
Additional Coverage; $2,500 or limit shown in Declarations, whichever is greater, per policy year

positives: Agreed Value endorsement in place, suspending coinsurance penalty
Coinsurance at 80% meeting threshold for Coverage Extensions
Broad endorsement package including Equipment Breakdown and Utility Services Direct Damage
Business Income and Extra Expense coverage in place
concerns: Annotation on Utility Services endorsement page states 'Need docs', suggesting documentation may be outstanding
Several endorsement pages are low-resolution/partially illegible

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. SIC Code: 4215.
